properties.name: Aurelune × Halo & Helix — Global Master Services Agreement
properties.fx_policy: Local cost lines invoiced in market currency; converted to GBP at month-end rate from the contract's fixed FX table. Variance ≤2% absorbed by agency.
properties.scope_notes: Global strategy, creative, production. Local-market activation in UK and US. In-market partner production in DE / FR / JP / CN. 3-year initial term, 12-month renewal options.

properties.name: Aurelune Japan — Local Activation Addendum
properties.fx_policy: Invoiced in JPY. Subject to master MSA terms.
properties.scope_notes: Adds local-market production and channel activation in Japan, partnering with a Tokyo-based production house. Approval chain includes the JP brand team.

properties.name: Aurelune Greater China — Cross-Border Activation Addendum
properties.fx_policy: Invoiced in CNY. Subject to master MSA terms.
properties.scope_notes: Cross-border activation only (no mainland on-the-ground media). Xiaohongshu UGC programme and Tier-1 airport OOH. All claims pre-cleared against cross-border regulation.
